direct_answers.artifact_wrapper_builder: scripts/lib/finalRoundArtifacts.mjs writeBrowserArtifacts writes teamBuilderFinalRoundArtifactData.js through publicWrapperText("teamBuilderArtifact", slimTeamBuilderArtifact).
direct_answers.browser_default_path: script.js buildTeam uses generatedFinalRoundBalancedSquad() before buildSuggestedSquad(); generatedFinalRoundBalancedSquad is active only when defaultFinalRoundArtifactInputsActive() is true.
direct_answers.browser_locks_and_substitutions_path: script.js buildSuggestedSquad, lockedPlayerIds, excludedPlayerIds, getValidLockedSquadPlayers, render/export flows, and swapStarterWithBench remain the browser user-interaction path.
direct_answers.browser_artifact_bypass_conditions: Locks, exclusions, non-balanced strategy, non-4-3-3 formation, non-All country, price filters, minutes/start filters, risk controls, trust controls, and non-Final Round states bypass the generated artifact default.

browser_but_not_generated: Country, price, trust, minutes, start-probability, and risk filters
Substitution advisor and starter-bench swap interactions
Manual captain and vice-captain export state
duplicated_equivalent: Budget limit and budget usage checks
unsafe_to_extract_now: Scoring, risk, trust, optionality, and tie-breaking behavior
Locks, removals, substitutions, filters, and user-interaction behavior

final_recommendation.smallest_safe_next_step: Keep the public default artifact-backed, add the equivalence matrix and readiness validator, and defer deeper extraction until isolated optimizer fixtures cover path search, scoring, tie-breaking, and user-state divergence.
